server_select.prompt:
## 📬 Which server would you like to contact?
You're in multiple servers that use modmail. Please select one below.
server_select.confirmed:
## 📬 Now chatting with **{server}**
Your message has been sent. A staff member will get back to you shortly.
-# Reply here to continue the conversation.

errors.not_configured:
## ❌ Not Configured
Modmail is not configured for this server. Use `/modmail setup` to get started.
errors.not_a_modmail:
## ❌ Not a Modmail Thread
This channel is not an active modmail thread.
errors.config_missing:
## ❌ Config Missing
The modmail configuration for this server could not be found.
errors.generic:
## ❌ Error
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.close_failed:
## ❌ Close Failed
Failed to close this modmail thread. Please try again.
errors.dm_closed:
## ⚠️ DMs Closed
Your message was sent, but we were unable to DM the user — they may have DMs disabled.
errors.invalid_color:
## ❌ Invalid Color
`{field}` must be a valid hex color (e.g. `#5865F2` or `#FFF`).

setup.info: -# Users can now DM this bot to contact your moderation team. Use `/modmail snippet add` to create quick-reply templates.

close.confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to close this modmail? The conversation will be saved as a transcript and the thread will be deleted.
close.cancelled:
## ✅ Cancelled
Closing action has been cancelled.
close.thinking:
### ⏳ Please Wait
Generating transcript and closing this modmail...
close.reason_placeholder: e.g. Issue resolved, user unresponsive, ban appeal declined...

reply.success:
## ✅ Reply Sent
Your message has been sent to the user.
reply.dm_failed:
## ⚠️ Reply Sent (DM Failed)
Your message was logged in the thread, but we could not deliver the DM — the user may have DMs disabled.

block.already_blocked:
## ⚠️ Already Blocked
<@{userId}> is already blocked from using modmail.

unblock.success:
## ✅ User Unblocked
<@{userId}> can now open modmail threads again.
unblock.not_blocked:
## ⚠️ Not Blocked
<@{userId}> is not currently blocked from using modmail.

snippet.add_success:
## ✅ Snippet Added
Snippet `{name}` has been saved. Use `/modmail snippet use {name}` to send it.
snippet.remove_success:
## ✅ Snippet Removed
Snippet `{name}` has been deleted.
snippet.not_found:
## ❌ Snippet Not Found
No snippet named `{name}` exists. Use `/modmail snippet list` to view all snippets.
snippet.list_empty:
## 📭 No Snippets
This server has no saved snippets yet.

Use `/modmail snippet add <name> <content>` to create your first quick-reply template.
snippet.limit:
## ⚠️ Snippet Limit Reached
You have reached the maximum of **50** snippets. Remove one before adding more.

dm.greeting:
## 📬 Modmail Opened
Thank you for contacting us! A member of our team will be with you shortly.

-# Please be patient and keep this DM open while we review your message.
dm.closing_message:
## 🔒 Modmail Closed
Your modmail thread has been closed. If you need further assistance, feel free to DM us again.
dm.blocked:
## ❌ Blocked
You are not able to open a modmail thread in this server.
dm.cooldown:
## ⏳ Please Wait
You recently had a modmail thread closed. Please wait **{minutes} more minute(s)** before opening a new one.
